section.title: Interactive demo
section.subtitle: Guided 3-step flow: configure the session, start verification, and see the return result.

config.title: Start KYC demo
config.subtitle: Choose the mode and flow type, then generate a session to test.
config.heading: Settings

integrationModeHelp.redirect: Opens in another tab and returns with URL parameters.

flowTypeHelp.liveness: Continues a flow using an existing identifier.

config.sessionExistsNotice: You already generated a session. Changing settings may require generating a new one.
config.configDirty: Settings changed. Generate a new session to apply.

start.iframeEmpty: Generate a session in step 1 to enable the iframe.

redirect.open: Open verification in a new tab
redirect.openAria: Open verification in a new tab
redirect.help: KYC will open in another tab. When you finish, you’ll return to this page with the result.
redirect.needSession: Generate a session in step 1 to continue.

result.title: Return result
result.noneSubtitle: Complete verification in step 2 to see the result here.

cpf.title: Start KYC demo
cpf.subtitle: Enter a valid CPF to generate a demo session
cpf.label: CPF
cpf.tipBody: Use any valid CPF to test
cpf.startFailed: Couldn’t start the session. Please try again.

onboardingId.title: Continue KYC session
onboardingId.subtitle: Enter the session ID (GUID) to continue
onboardingId.label: Onboarding ID (GUID)
onboardingId.submissionIdHelp: Fill this when the API returns submission_id to build the liveness URL (step=6, flow=liveness).
onboardingId.embeddedHelp: Enter the session ID (GUID) to continue.

result.rejected: Verification not approved. You can try again.
result.canceled: Process canceled. You can start again.
result.approved: Verification approved. You can start a new process.

redirectPanel.title: Redirect result
redirectPanel.waiting: Waiting for a Redirect flow return. Open KYC in a new tab and, when finished, you’ll come back here with the result.
redirectPanel.hint: In your application, use these parameters to update the onboarding or continue the user flow.

paramsTable.empty: No query parameters in the URL.

mobileOnly.banner: KYC flow works only on mobile devices (uses camera and location). Scan the QR code to open on your phone.
